log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, likely a spreader or overlay, with a size of 954520 bytes. Get an overview of the available IOCs to identify potential indicators of compromise.
The sample does not appear to have any network activity, registry persistence, or process creation. However, it does drop two files. Investigate the dropped files to gather more information.
The dropped files are executable files, but their types are unknown. Investigate the file behavior to gather more information.

The sample does not appear to create any registry persistence keys. Investigate the network activity to gather more information.
The sample does not appear to have any network activity. Investigate the file system changes to gather more information.
